message:
feat(db): wire search cache, warmup recording, and invalidation into execute_search (br-2tnl.5.5)

Add QueryCache integration to the search execution path:
- Global SEARCH_CACHE singleton with env-configurable CacheConfig
- Cache GET at top of execute_search() with deterministic cache keys
  (query text + mode + filter hash + epoch + cursor hash + limit)
- Cache PUT at all 4 return paths (Tantivy, Hybrid, FTS5, Empty plan)
- Cache invalidation in TwoTierBridge::add_document on index update
- SearchQuery::to_search_filter() converts planner facets to SearchFilter
- engine_to_search_mode() maps SearchEngine config to cache SearchMode

Add WarmWorker integration for resource readiness tracking:
- Global WARM_WORKER singleton with default config
- Warmup start/complete/failure recording in init_bridge (Tantivy),
  init_semantic_bridge, and get_or_init_two_tier_bridge
- Public API: warm_worker_status(), search_cache_metrics(),
  invalidate_search_cache(), record_warmup{,_start,_failure}()

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
